task_completion.description: Data from sales_data.csv is imported into Power BI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data/Fields pane on the right side of the Power BI window shows the imported table (likely named 'sales_data') with columns such as Sales_Amount, Quantity_Sold, Region, etc.

task_completion.description: Two DAX measures named Total_Revenue and Total_Units are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data/Fields pane shows 'Total_Revenue' and 'Total_Units' with a small calculator icon next to them, indicating they are measures.

task_completion.description: The 'Overview' page contains Card visuals for Sales_Amount and Quantity_Sold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page tab named 'Overview' is visible at the bottom. The canvas contains two Card visuals displaying numbers close to 5.02M (for Sales_Amount or Total_Revenue) and 25K (for Quantity_Sold or Total_Units).

task_completion.description: The 'Overview' page contains a Donut chart for Sales_Amount by Product_Category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Donut chart is visible on the 'Overview' canvas showing segments for Product Categories (Electronics, Clothing, Food, Furniture).

task_completion.description: The 'Regional Detail' page contains a Clustered Bar Chart for Sales_Amount by Region with Sales_Rep as legend.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page tab named 'Regional Detail' is visible at the bottom. The canvas contains a Clustered Bar Chart with Regions (North, South, East, West) on one axis and multiple colored bars per region representing the Sales Reps (Alice, Bob, Charlie, David, Eve).

task_completion.description: The 'Regional Detail' page contains a Slicer for Sales_Channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Slicer visual is visible on the 'Regional Detail' canvas showing filter options for 'Online' and 'Retail'.

task_completion.description: The report is saved as Sales_KPI_Dashboard.pbix.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Power BI window title bar shows 'Sales_KPI_Dashboard - Power BI Desktop', or there is a save dialog showing the file being saved to the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Power BI Desktop GUI to build the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Power BI Desktop application open with active interactions (e.g., dragging fields, clicking visual icons, writing DAX formulas in the formula bar).

integrity.description: The visuals display the actual data values from the provided CSV, not mocked or hardcoded text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Card visuals show ~5.02M and ~25K. Charts show correct categories (Electronics, Clothing, etc.) and regions (North, South, etc.) rather than placeholder data.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of a Python or PowerShell script being used to generate the .pbix file directly in a terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The sales_data.csv contains 1000 rows. Total Sales_Amount is exactly 5,019,265.23 (often displayed as 5.02M in Power BI) and total Quantity_Sold is 25,355 (often displayed as 25K). Product Categories are Electronics, Clothing, Food, Furniture. Regions are North, South, East, West. Sales Reps are Alice, Bob, Charlie, David, Eve. Sales Channels are Online, Retail. The required DAX measures are Total_Revenue and Total_Units.
